title: Stale typing indicators persist across reconnect
description: Trigger: Peer A sends typing=true. Client B's connection drops. B reconnects. _typingUsers and _typingTimers are NOT cleared in connect() or disconnect() (only in the auth-failure error path). After reconnect, B's UI still shows 'A typing...' even though A may have stopped. The 4-second auto-dismiss timer will eventually clear it, but only if it hasn't already fired and been garbage-collected. Fix: clear _typingUsers and cancel+clear _typingTimers in connect() before establishing the new connection, just like the auth failure path does.
